top_signals.summary: Further disruption to Middle East shipments prompts Asia and Europe to look elsewhere for supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil hits $100 for first time since May
top_signals.summary: Attack by Houthis on Saudi Arabian tankers in Red Sea threatens further squeeze on energy supplies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commercial crude oil inventories increased by 2.0 million barrels
top_signals.summary: For the week ending July 17, 2026, commercial crude oil inventories (excluding the Strategic Petroleum Reserve) increased 2.0 million barrels to 411.7 million barrels, 6% below the previous five-year (2021–2025) average. Gasoline inventories increased 0.8 million barrels, 7% below the five-year average. Distillate inventories increased 1.4 million barrels, 10% below the five-year average. Propane/propylene inventories increased 6.3 million barrels, 34% above the five-year average. Total commercial petroleum inventories increased by 11.6 million barrels for the week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: How will Burnham govern the UK? You asked, we answered
top_signals.summary: The FT’s northern England correspondent Jennifer Williams, columnist and Inside Politics writer Stephen Bush and UK chief political commentator Robert Shrimsley, replied to reader questions

top_signals.title: Burnham accused of gutting tech department’s ‘biggest strength’
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham’s decision to abolish the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) will split up the teams it was created to bring together, according to its former top civil servant. A leaked internal government document shows AI, digital and science responsibilities being divided between three departments as ministers begin dismantling DSIT less than three [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
